title: D11
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''D11''' was a class of [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] manufactured by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] sometime after the rise of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. It was faster and more heavily armed than the earlier [[D9 Runner light freighter]] design also produced by Kuat Drive Yards.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-XX -->''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]''
